<!-- generated by adectl project adopt -->
# 0001: Adopt the ADE Project Context Contract

Status: Accepted

## Decision

`kinward` uses `ai.yaml` as its executable contract and `.ai/` as curated, committed
project context. Detection is based on repository files and does not execute project code.

## Consequences

Commands and context must be updated together when workflows change. User-authored files are
preserved by adoption, and generated files can be refreshed explicitly.
